title: EIGRP ACL Düzeltme (R30) + CoPP: Telnet 10000 bps Police (R20)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: EIGRP is preconfigured on all routers. Configure R20 and R30 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Modify the existing ACL on R30 so that EIGRP routes are received from R10 and R20. (1) The modification should only allow EIGRP routes to pass. (2) Do not remove any configuration from R30 to achieve this task.
Task 2: Configure CoPP on R20 to achieve these results: (1) Permit Telnet traffic from 192.168.24.124. (2) Limit traffic to 10,000 bps. (3) Discard additional packets.

required_any_of.line: permit tcp host 192.168.24.124 any eq telnet
permit tcp host 192.168.24.124 any eq telnet

hints: R30'da 'show access-lists' ile ACL numarasını doğrula (120 bekleniyor); '5 permit eigrp any any' sırası deny'den önce olmalı.
Kaynak tek host: 'permit tcp host 192.168.24.124 any eq telnet'.
10,000 bps limit + fazlasını at: 'police 10000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop'.
answer_key_raw:
R30:
R30> enable
R30# configure terminal
R30(config)# ip access-list extended 120
R30(config-ext-nacl)# 5 permit eigrp any any
R30(config-ext-nacl)# end
R30# write

R20:
R20> enable
R20# configure terminal
R20(config)# ip access-list extended TELNET
R20(config-ext-nacl)# permit tcp host 192.168.24.124 any eq telnet
R20(config-ext-nacl)# exit
R20(config)# class-map match-any TELNET
R20(config-cmap)# match access-group name TELNET
R20(config-cmap)# exit
R20(config)# policy-map COPP
R20(config-pmap)# class TELNET
R20(config-pmap-c)# police 10000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
R20(config-pmap-c)# control-plane
R20(config-cp)# service-policy input COPP
R20(config-cp)# end
R20# write
explanation: Item 15'in varyantı: R30'daki ACL 120'ye deny'den önce işlenen '5 permit eigrp any any' eklenir. R20'de CoPP: PC20'den (192.168.24.124) gelen Telnet'i tanımlayan ACL, class-map, 10000 bps police (fazlası drop) ve control-plane'e input service-policy.
